_comment: All loop caps and routing live HERE, never in prompts (ADR-007). The agent cannot raise a cap that is an integer enforced by the wrapper. See docs/architecture/12 Loops.md for the stop-condition inventory.

fixRounds._comment: Goal-based loop in triage.mjs: IMPLEMENT -> Gate A -> (RED -> FIX -> full Gate A) x max. models[i] = model for fix round i+1; 'inherit' = same model as the implement phase (escalation ladder). Cheap = lint/commit/staged/imports failures; deep = typecheck/test.

diffGrowth._comment: Runaway-rewrite guard: a fix round growing the diff by more than this vs before the round is BLOCKED, not re-gated.

poll._comment: Time-based loop (triage-tick.mjs). intervalMinutes is documentation - the real interval is the Task Scheduler registration. dailyTicketCap: start the pilot at 1, raise on trust.

prFeedback._comment: Reserved for the DEFERRED PR-feedback loop (12 Loops.md). Not consumed by any script yet.
